subcodes.first_line: He speaketh the truth in the Kingdom of Utterance according to the measure decreed, and remaineth silent concerning that which thou art unable to hear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینطق بالحق فی ملکوت البیان علی قدر مقدور و یصمت عما لا تقدر ان تسمعه
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @Word of God and human limitations, @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
